response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior engineer with 14+ years of breadth across multiple domains and real-time systems experience. However, the role requires a CTO with production multi-agent AI systems experience, fintech infrastructure expertise, and a proven track record scaling engineering teams to 30+ people in regulated environments. His current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (4 months in) is too recent to demonstrate capability, he has only 1.3 years of fintech exposure without clear infrastructure depth, and there is no evidence of team scaling or technical leadership development required for this executive position.
strengths: 14+ years engineering tenure with staff-level roles across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, backend, DevOps)
Production real-time systems experience: Dunnhumby handled millions of requests/second with low-latency, high-performance requirements
Currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, demonstrating emerging engagement with agentic AI patterns
concerns: No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems; current AI-agent role (4 months) insufficient to validate CTO-level capability in this critical domain
Missing required executive leadership: no evidence of scaling teams from 10–30+ people, building internal technical leadership layers, or communicating technical roadmap to boards
Minimal fintech infrastructure experience (1.3 years at RIDE Capital) with no demonstrated expertise in credit systems, payment flows, compliance infrastructure, or regulated environments
